query: SELECT id, title, slug, featured, published, publishedAt, coverImageUrl, createdAt FROM blogPosts ORDER BY featured DESC, createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user y9xXqMvzCrNXPbj.1987515a4b92 --database C4sZdm4AzTGBpMWqRug5mc --execute SELECT id, title, slug, featured, published, publishedAt, coverImageUrl, createdAt FROM blogPosts ORDER BY featured DESC, createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
